risk_title: Refugee enrollment and completion tracking gaps
risk_summary: The project targets refugees as a key vulnerable group but has zero reported enrollment and completion data for refugees across multiple indicators, with comments indicating data is 'currently not available.' This represents a significant implementation gap for a core FCV-vulnerable population.
evidence_quote: Increased enrollment in selected TVET areas - Refugees (Number) 220.00 0 0 800.00... Share of trainees completing TVET programs increased - Refugees (Percentage) Comments on achieving targets This data is currently not available but will be gathered before the next ISR.

risk_title: Persons with disabilities exclusion from training programs
risk_summary: Despite targeting persons with disabilities as a vulnerable group, zero individuals with disabilities have been enrolled or completed training programs across multiple indicators, suggesting systemic barriers to inclusion of this FCV-vulnerable population.
evidence_quote: Increased enrollment in selected TVET areas - Persons with disabilities (Number) 47.00 0 0 160.00... Share of trainees completing TVET programs increased - Persons with disabilities (Percentage) Comments on achieving targets This data is currently not available but will be gathered before the next ISR.

risk_title: Refugee participation in work-based learning and apprenticeships stalled
risk_summary: Zero refugees have been engaged in apprenticeships, internships, OJT and work-based learning despite a target of 180, indicating potential displacement or refugee population access barriers to employment integration activities.
evidence_quote: Number and share of students engaged in Apprenticeships, Internships, OJT and WBL - Refugees (Number) 0.00 0.00 0.00 180.00

risk_title: Labor mobility agreements not advancing amid regional tensions
risk_summary: Zero bilateral labor agreements have been signed despite a target of 6, and zero short-term migrant workers have been deployed despite a target of 250. This suggests potential governance or regional political barriers to labor mobility initiatives.
evidence_quote: IRI # 4: Number of Bilateral Labor Agreements signed (Number)... 0.00 Sep/2021 0 09-Jan-2025 0 12-Aug-2025 6.00 Sep/2027... IRI # 5: Annual number of short-term migrant workers from Djibouti... 0.00 Sep/2021 0 09-Jan-2025 0 12-Aug-2025 250.00 Sep/2026

risk_title: Online gig work initiative abandoned due to coordination constraints
risk_summary: The online gig work indicator targeting 500 individuals is being deleted during restructuring due to 'significant delays' and 'technical constraints and coordination with implementing partners,' suggesting governance or institutional coordination failures affecting vulnerable populations.
evidence_quote: IRI # 3: Number of individuals engaged in Online Gig Work... During the upcoming restructuring, this indicator will be deleted due to significant delays in the implementation of the corresponding activity. As of the mid-term review, no concrete action had yet been taken, partly due to technical constraints and coordination with implementing partners.
